results.title: Panakkad Sayyid Nasir Abdul Hayya Shihabuddin Ba'alawi assumes office as new Dakshina Kannada Qazi
results.description: Daijiworld Media Network - Mangaluru Mangaluru, Jul 22: Panakkad Sayyid Nasir Abdul Hayya Shihabuddin Ba'alawi formally assumed office as the new Qazi of Dakshina Kannada district at a ceremony held at Zeenath Baksh Yatheem Khana Hall on Ansari Road, Bunder, on Wednesday.

results.title: TOTAL JUMP ROPE PRODIGY! They thought it was just a simple rope, but she delivered a high-octane acrobatic masterpiece that left everyone speechless!
